releases.summary: Spinoff CTI Group · J1 System Dashboard with the J1 Housing Finder as its own full-page route, paired with the Poseidon master dashboard. State + Utilities filters added, every filter is instant-search, RentByOwner deep links fixed, Jarvis fully wired across every dropdown on every dashboard.
highlights: NEW: CTI Group · J1 System Dashboard — focused J1-only spinoff at /j1-system-dashboard.html
NEW: Cross-dashboard switcher pills — top-right header on each dashboard jumps to the other
NEW: J1 Housing Finder is now a top-level full-bleed page on the J1 System Dashboard
NEW: State filter (50 + DC) — scopes the City dropdown automatically
NEW: Utilities combo filter (All / Any / None Included)
NEW: MWF (Mon/Wed/Fri) refresh cadence — header shows last + next refresh date
FIX: RentByOwner deep links — switched to canonical /all/usa/{state}/{city} (was 404 on every listing)
JARVIS: full readability of every housing finder dropdown + instant-search behavior

changes.text: CTI Group · J1 System Dashboard — single-file spinoff with focused J1-only sidebar (PR #17)
Cross-dashboard switcher pill in both headers (PR #18)
Boost contrast on switcher + Connect 365 buttons (solid bg, white text, AA-compliant) (PR #19)
Swap Processing (CUK) for J1 Housing Finder full-page route on the J1 dashboard (PR #20)
J1 Housing Finder page is full-bleed across the monitor — :has() lifts the 1500px cap only on this page (PR #21)
Header padding so 'Back to V6' button no longer covers J1 Housing Finder title on direct visits (PR #22)
RentByOwner deep links — canonical /all/usa/{state-name}/{city-slug} pattern; verified 19/19 listing cities return 200 (PR #23)
Jarvis discovers J1 Housing Finder via the new j1housingfinder full-page route in addition to the legacy nested-tab path (PR #24)
Add State + Utilities filters; every dropdown now fires applyFilters() on change for instant search (PR #25)
MWF refresh cadence indicator (Mon/Wed/Fri) on housing finder header — shows last + next refresh date

releases.summary: Interactive training, link directory, changelog component, LLM enhancements, and Grok-powered voice assistant.
highlights: NEW: Grok Voice Jarvis with WebSocket streaming + tool calling
NEW: Interactive onboarding training module (JSON-configurable)
NEW: Searchable Directory of every link, program, and integration
NEW: Version & Changelog widget in header
NEW: LLM enhancement layer (PDF parser, forecasting, video brief, client briefings)
NEW: Morning briefing (Microsoft 365 calendar integration)

changes.text: Interactive training module — mobile-friendly, modular, driven by config/training-steps.json
Directory UI — searchable, filterable manifest of 40+ internal and external links
Version & Changelog modal — chronological, categorized release history
LLM layer for PDF housing parser — handles fuzzy dates, currency, pet policy, utility inclusions
LLM forecasting helper — linear regression + Holt-Winters style seasonality projection
LLM video brief generator — produces 8-scene scripts from intake form
LLM client briefing generator — auto-summarizes division state for executive briefings
Jarvis Voice Assistant — replaces ElevenLabs ConvAI with xAI Grok Voice via WebSocket
Jarvis tool calling — go_to_page, save_task, save_event, read_dashboard_state, morning_briefing, simulate_division, read_kpi
Morning Briefing — reads Microsoft 365 calendar + task priorities + division KPIs aloud
Floating Jarvis FAB — always-available voice button across every workspace
Header buttons: Directory · Version · Restart Training
Training cards optimized for iPhone/Android with swipe navigation

releases.summary: Major redesign: teal + navy command-center palette, Chart.js visualizations across every division.
highlights: Teal/navy theme replaces V5 indigo/zinc
Chart.js 4.4.0 on every division page
Forecasting, Simulations, What-If, Import, Export, PDF toolbar standardized
J1 Housing PDF parser with multi-option selector

changes.text: Master + Forecast division: consolidated KPIs, forecasted placements, regional hub pipeline
Finance division: Revenue, costs, P&L, forecasting
Recruiting division: J-1 and Cruise pipelines with markdown generation
Processing (CUK) division: visa tracking + document workflow
J1 Division: sponsor, participant, host-employer, consulate tracking
IT & Technology division: systems inventory + roadmap
J1 Housing page: paste PDF → parsed options (move-in, rent, utilities, amenities, pets)
Video Studio: intake form → auto brief → rendering pipeline
Dark mode default; light mode fully styled
Mobile drawer navigation with touch-optimized controls
MSAL for Microsoft 365 calendar + mail
Chart.js 4.4.0 for all visualizations

releases.summary: First production dashboard build. Indigo/zinc theme. All core modules functional.
highlights: Unified workspace with Tasks, Calendar, Videos, Projects, Partners
localStorage persistence for tasks, events, settings
Recruiting Division modules for J-1 and Cruise

changes.text: Sidebar navigation with 7 workspace pages
Task manager with modal create/edit flow
Calendar with month/week/day views
Video studio with production checklist
Projects and Partners views (read-only cards)
Settings page with theme, MSAL, and API config
Dark/light theme toggle persisted to localStorage
